title: The Body.
content:
The body is the soul's poor house or home,
    Whose ribs the laths are, and whose flesh the loam.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Body.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
